name: Jeremy Barnum
background: Mr. Barnum has been Chief Financial Officer since May 2021. He previously served as Head of Global Research for the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2021 to 2021 and as Chief Financial Officer of the Corporate & Investment Bank from 2013 to 2021.

company_affiliations.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Head of Global Research, Corporate & Investment Bank
